ud-√bhram P. -bhramati, bhrāmyati, to whirl or move, upwards, start or jump up;
to rise, ascend, raise one's self,  R. ;  Gīt. ;  MārkP. ;  BhP.  &c.:
Caus. -bhrāmayati, to wave, swing,  MBh. ;
to excite,  R.
